title: the-internet — login happy path
flow: Fill the login form with username tomsmith and the provided password, then submit. Check a green success flash banner appears containing the text You logged into a secure area. Then click Logout and check the page returns to the login form.

vars.flow: Fill the login form with username tomsmith and the provided password, then submit. Check a green success flash banner contains You logged into a secure area. Then click Logout and check the login form returns.

note: Login happy-path with a flash-banner assertion + logout.
